subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! Upon thee be My salutations! Thy missive hath reached and attained the honor of noble hearing, and hath been adorned with the glory of gracious acceptance. We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک سلامی نامه ات رسید و بشرف عز اصغا فائز و بعز شرف قبول مزین نسئل الله
